title: eriocoma occidentalis subsp. californica
intro: Eriocoma occidentalis subsp. californica, also known as California woollyhead, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional herbal medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues. The California woollyhead plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of digestive problems, fever, and skin conditions, among other health benefits. Herbal preparations of the plant may include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for various health concerns.
